title: ilex guangxica
intro: Ilex guangxica, also known as the Guangxi holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex guangxica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Ilex guangxica can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
